headline: Oilfield Services Stocks Q4 Recap: Benchmarking Halliburton (NYSE:HAL)
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who not so much). Let’s take a look at how oilfield services stocks fared in Q4, starting with Halliburton (NYSE:HAL).
